title: Asteridea asteroides
taxonomy: Asteridea asteroides is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its morphology and genetic makeup. The Asteridea asteroides is further categorized as a member of the genus Asteridea, which is a small group of plants found in Western Australia. The family Asteraceae is a widespread group of plants that includes many different types of plants, from small herbs to large shrubs and trees. intro: Asteridea asteroides, also known as Asteriscus maritimus, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly found in coastal areas of the Mediterranean region. The health benefits of Asteridea asteroides include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various ailments such as digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
